_doc: Routes that currently return 500 on the API smoke probe (un-hardened against missing UUIDs / invalid input). Smoke fails when this list drifts in EITHER direction — a new bug joins, OR an existing bug gets fixed (so we know to remove the entry). File a Linear ticket when adding; remove when patching the handler.

broken.note: Webhook signature validation throws when no body/headers; needs explicit 400 path for unsigned probes.
